pom.xml.general_idea: Add spring-boot-starter-web dependency for standard MVC web support.
Add spring-boot-starter-validation dependency for Bean Validation support.
Add spring-boot-starter-actuator dependency for production-ready features.
Add spring-boot-starter-aop dependency to enable Aspect-Oriented Programming for Resilience4j.
Add spring-boot-starter-cache and Caffeine dependencies for caching support.
Add Caffeine implementation for Spring Cache.
Add springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui for OpenAPI 3 documentation in Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: The previous springfox library is incompatible with Spring Boot 3/Spring Framework 6.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add resilience4j-spring-boot3 for circuit breaker and resilience patterns compatible with Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Resilience4j Spring Boot starters are incompatible with Spring Boot 3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add resilience4j-reactor for reactive support in Resilience4j.
Add micrometer-registry-prometheus for Prometheus metrics export.
Add micrometer-tracing-bridge-brave for distributed tracing support.
Add spring-boot-configuration-processor for IDE metadata generation.
Add spring-boot-starter-test for standard testing support.
Add reactor-test for testing reactive streams.
Add wiremock-standalone for HTTP mocking in tests.
Add archunit-junit5 for architecture testing.
Add awaitility for asynchronous testing assertions.
Configure maven-compiler-plugin to use the release flag for cross-compilation support.
Configure spring-boot-maven-plugin for Cloud Native Buildpacks image creation.
Add git-commit-id-maven-plugin to generate git information for actuator info endpoint.
Configure maven-surefire-plugin to exclude integration tests from unit test phase.
Add maven-failsafe-plugin to run integration tests during verify phase.
Add jacoco-maven-plugin for code coverage reporting and checks.
Add Maven profiles for dev, prod, and native image builds.
Add native-maven-plugin for GraalVM native image compilation.

Add Javadoc comment describing the service purpose and features.

Add Spring Cache @Cacheable annotation for caching user data.
Add SLF4J logging statements for debugging and tracing.
